des: Drake Baldwin flies out to center fielder Lawrence Butler.
Ronald Acuña Jr. doubles (1) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Lawrence Butler.
Michael Harris II grounds out, shortstop Jacob Wilson to first baseman Nick Kurtz.
Daulton Varsho walks. Alejandro Kirk to 2nd.
Vladimir Guerrero Jr. singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jeff McNeil. Jesús Sánchez scores. Addison Barger to 2nd.
Addison Barger grounds into a force out, second baseman Andy Ibáñez to shortstop Jacob Wilson. Jesús Sánchez to 3rd. Andrés Giménez out at 2nd. Addison Barger to 1st.
